title: cyclosorus oligophyllus
intro: Cyclosorus oligophyllus, also known as the Small-leaf cyclosorus or Chinese ladder fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus oligophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
